raw_text: made the things soo easier as it's now soo easy to get everything at my doorstep whatever I need as just before my class I ordered the stuff and in just 7 minutes sooo best app for everyone!!!

when i started ordering it was good, getting fresh vegetables. sometimes i get other vegetables instead of what I ordered, sometimes not so fresh vegetables and less quantity . when i complain i get a refund. compared to other apps its a ok ok app.

It is a bit too expensive... you will not be able to buy anything Because they will increase the price of only just 2 products!!! to such a high price that you will not be able to buy anything...this is ridiculous Fr
Nice app, easyly we can search our product. We can select and after adding in card it is easy to pay. We got quick service and delivery person also was good.

Blinkit is charging Surge charge of rupees 30 when I ordered 2 items costing less than 500. This is ridiculous, it does not take the customer's acceptance and apply any amount of charge. No more Blinkit.. quitting this app.

worsttt app cash on dilevery option is always unavailable mostly items are out of stock the fampay payment method takes too much time and still failed if there is something less than 1 star I will give u that at start I thought it was good but I was wrong worstestttt app just ragebaited and frustrated me👽🥀

Customer support is not good. there is only one email address. no escalation matrix listed on the website as well. they would ask many questions and then you have to leave discussion. On app you only have option to chat. you can't provide customized response.

Delivery is too fast.I am satisfied with qoick response and quality,packing is also good .Delivery person's behaviour is polite .Happy with Blinkit In last order, 2 items were missing but after raising issue remaining items received in less than 7minutes Thank you for the help from a lady on a phone and delivery boy. ,

really impressed with blinkit the delivery is super fast product are fresh and the app is very easy to use l've orderd groceries , snacks and daily essentials multiple times and the experience has always been smooth. the delivery partner are polite and order usually arrive before the expected time very convenient for busy schedule. highly recommended

Excellent service! I received my Product it within just 10 minutes. The delivery was quick, smooth, and the product was in perfect condition. Very impressed with Blinkit's fast delivery and customer service. Keep up the great work!

earlier i rated 5 stars but now I've to change it to 1 star as I'm not able to place orders from my Blikit app all the payment options are not going, I also added money to Blikit wallet still the payment is not going even from Blinkit wallet. Issue resolved thanks for the quick support.

This app is really useless, they give goods at higher rates than the outside rate and my 20₹ note was a little old so they did not accept it and cancelled the order, it is not even true that the note is torn, I will never use this app again
some items are over priced here..only good thing is quick delivery. but price should not be over .rather they must give discount on different things daily to increase sale.

it keeps products which are not sealed & tored. then refuses to take return too. somewhere in the smallest part they ll write that this product is non returnable. so either please dont buy from blinkit or read the product data carefully for an hour and then buy.

don't even give refund for missing items and unlike instamart asks send problem to emails after sending emails telling that delivery team confirmed all items so we can't give refund Most annoying app plz do not install it

I am an old user of Blinkit. Today I have ordered Loreal shampoo and conditioner from this App and got half filled products to which their customer care dept also got agreed after taking product pics and videos from me thrice. Despite of being agree they told me that they cant help me with either replacement or return. I was forced to buy half filled products at full price. its a complete fraud and cheating case. I will STOP ALL MY PURCHASES FROM THIS. PLS BE AWARE EVERYONE.

there's no customer support number and the delivery partners steal items with no way for the user to submit a complaint or get refunded, i don't want to chat with useless ai bots , extremely disappointed

good but sometimes it glitches one time my address was correct but the delivery man went the opposite and I called and asked he answers that the location is here and i arrived with your items but it is the opposite direction of order i hoe they would fix this asap

I wanted to say thank you to Blinkit because I can order anything at any time. I don't have to wait for the shops to open anymore. I can simply place an order, and it arrives on time. So, yeah, it's really useful and helpful for our busy schedules....

It is a good app and the delivery is fast but the problem is with the refund system they say u'll expect the refund by 3-5 buisness days but the reality is the money is never refunded it happend to me more than 15 times all over good
